issue.message: Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.

Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/dialog_background` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Commonlib`)

Buttons in button bars should be borderless; use `style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"` (and `?android:attr/buttonBarStyle` on the parent)
Buttons in button bars should be borderless; use `style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"` (and `?android:attr/buttonBarStyle` on the parent)
Avoid using sizes smaller than `11sp`: `10sp`
Missing `autofillHints` attribute
Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.
Hardcoded string "返回", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "日志示例", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "点击按钮输出不同级别的日志（请查看 Logcat）", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1: android:text="点击按钮输出不同级别的日志（请查看 Logcat）"
